query:
SELECT id, numero, nome, en1, sa1, en2, sa2, observacoes FROM horarios_custom WHERE numero = '13';
SELECT id, data, en1, sa1, en2, sa2, en1Auto, saldo, atrasoEn FROM registos_diarios WHERE numero = '13' AND ignorada = 0 ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
